title: Vietnamese-Style Pork Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with tender pork and a variety of spices. Perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in the pot over medium-high heat.
Add the pork cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the fish sauce, soy sauce, sugar, and chili flakes and stir to combine.
Add the water to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the pork is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions and fresh cilantro, if desired.
